overview: Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21304
description:
[10.0.100-2.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[10.0.100-2]
- Fix version strings to remove -rtm in the built SDK
- Related: RHEL-125747

[10.0.100-1]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.100 and Runtime 10.0.0
- Resolves: RHEL-125747

[10.0.100~rc.2.25502.107-0.10]
- Update to .NET SDK 10.0.100-rc.2.25502.107 and Runtime 10.0.0-rc.2.25502.107
- Resolves: RHEL-121301

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.9]
- Disable bootstrap
- Resolves: RHEL-114568

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.8]
- Update to .NET 10 RC 1
- Resolves: RHEL-114568

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.7]
- Drop netstandard-targeting-pack-2.1, it's being removed by upstream in RC 1
- Related: RHEL-98673

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.6]
- Disable bootstrap
- Resolves: RHEL-98673

[10.0.100~preview.6.25358.103-0.5]
- Initial commit on c9s
- Resolves: RHEL-98673
full_text:
Oracle Linux Bug Fix Advisory ELBA-2025-21304

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-21304.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 8 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
aspnetcore-runtime-10.0-10.0.0-2.0.1.el8_10.x86_64.rpm
